state.next-action:
Phase 31 complete: skill ecosystem — provenance diffing, badges, creation workflow, framework labeling (commit 318d576). Build passes.
=== DONE THIS SESSION === - Skill provenance diffing in gad eval preserve (compares start vs end snapshots, writes skills_authored to TRACE.json) - RunSkillProvenanceSection on per-run page with installed/inherited/authored badges - gad:create-skill command now mandates eval project scaffold (step 6) - Framework skill labeling on /skills page (violet badge for framework_skill: true)
=== NEXT === 1. GAD CLI build/release pipeline (Windows) — phase 29 2. Merge /gad page: framework + catalog + hypothesis matrix 3. Move rubric to project detail (gad-131) 4. Site reusability review (gad-134) 5. Run evals (round 5, tech-stacks, reverse-engineer)
